## LibraryRuntime.LibraryRuntimeContext.resolveMoldRefs() method

Resolves mold references to runtime mold objects.

**Signature:**

```typescript
resolveMoldRefs(molds: IOptionsWithPreferred<IConfectionMoldRef, MoldId>): IOptionsWithPreferred<IResolvedConfectionMoldRef, MoldId>;
```
